data.title: Cycurion Secures Florida Management Consulting Contract
data.description:

Cycurion ( (CYCU) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On December 2, 2025, Cycurion, Inc. announced it has been awarded a position on the State of Florida’s Management Consulting Services State Term Contract. This contract allows Cycurion to provide management consulting services to state agencies across Florida, supporting operational excellence and modernization. The award reflects Cycurion’s trusted track record and dedication to partnering with government customers, offering strategic planning, program management, and other advisory services to enhance public sector operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (CYCU) stock is a Hold with a $6.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cycurion stock, see the CYCU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CYCU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CYCU is a Neutral.

Cycurion’s stock score is primarily impacted by its financial performance and technical analysis. The company shows some operational improvements, but high leverage and cash flow issues are significant concerns. Technical indicators suggest bearish momentum, and the negative P/E ratio further weighs down the valuation score.

To see Spark’s full report on CYCU stock, click here.

More about Cycurion

Based in McLean, Virginia, Cycurion, Inc. is a forward-thinking provider of IT cybersecurity solutions and AI, specializing in cybersecurity, program management, and business continuity. The company serves government, healthcare, and corporate clients worldwide, leveraging its AI-enhanced ARx platform and expert team to deliver secure and innovative services.

data.description:

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

An update from VanEck Solana ETF ( (VSOL) ) is now available.

On November 30, 2025, MarketVector Indexes GmbH, the index sponsor and administrator for the MarketVectorTM Solana Benchmark Rate, announced changes to its constituent trading platforms. The company replaced Bitstamp and Bullish with Crypto.com and OKX, respectively, in the calculation of the Index, which now includes Coinbase, Crypto.com, Gemini, Kraken, and OKX. This adjustment in platform composition could influence the accuracy and reliability of the Index, impacting stakeholders who rely on it for market insights.

More about VanEck Solana ETF

Canadian General Inv ( (TSE:CGI) ) has issued an announcement.

Canadian General Investments reported an unaudited net asset value per share of $80.73 as of November 30, 2025, with year-to-date and 12-month NAV returns of 18.2% and 13.9%, respectively. Despite these returns, they lag behind the benchmark S&P/TSX Composite Index. The company has reduced its leverage to 11.9% of net assets, and its share price closed at $45.50, reflecting a 15.4% year-to-date return. The announcement highlights CGI’s strategic sector allocations and top investments, which are crucial for stakeholders to assess the company’s market positioning and investment strategy.

An announcement from Meridian Energy Limited ( (MDDNF) ) is now available.

Meridian Energy Limited announced the resignation of Michelle Henderson from her role as an independent director, effective January 27, 2026. Henderson’s departure is due to her new appointment as General Manager of New Zealand Aluminium Smelters, indicating a significant career move and potential strategic shifts within Meridian’s board.

Meridian Energy Limited is a company incorporated in New Zealand, primarily involved in the energy sector. It is listed on the NZX and ASX stock exchanges under the symbols MEL and MEZ, respectively.

Cannabix Technologies ( (TSE:BLO) ) has provided an update.

Cannabix Technologies has secured a second sales agreement for its BreathLogix unmanned alcohol screening technology with a European maritime shipping customer. This agreement involves the delivery of an additional BreathLogix unit to enhance crew safety through pre-access breath alcohol testing, integrated with the cloud-based BreathLogix Connect platform for real-time alerts and data management. The device also features facial recognition for secure identification and is designed for deployment across various industries where safety is paramount.

data.title: Manganese X Energy Launches Battery Hill Prefeasibility Study
data.description:
TipRanks Cyber Monday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Manganese X Energy Corp ( (TSE:MN) ) has issued an announcement.

Manganese X Energy Corp. has initiated a prefeasibility study for its Battery Hill High Purity Manganese project, selecting ABH Engineering Inc. and GEMTEC Consulting Engineering and Scientists Ltd. to lead the study. This move marks a significant milestone for the company as it aims to optimize project economics and environmental stewardship, advancing Battery Hill towards becoming a key production hub for the EV and energy-storage sectors in North America. The study will incorporate recent advancements and is expected to enhance the project’s readiness for production, potentially impacting the North American supply chain for high purity manganese.

Spark’s Take on TSE:MN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:MN is a Neutral.

Manganese X Energy Corp faces major financial hurdles with no revenue and negative cash flows. While recent investments and project advancements offer potential future benefits, current technical indicators show mixed signals, and valuation concerns persist due to financial instability.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:MN stock, click here.

More about Manganese X Energy Corp

Manganese X Energy Corp. is focused on advancing its Battery Hill project to become the first publicly traded manganese mining company in Canada and the U.S. to commercialize high purity manganese for electric vehicles. The company aims to supply value-added materials to the lithium-ion battery and alternative energy industries, while developing carbon-friendly and cost-effective processing methodologies.

Average Trading Volume: 202,860

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$23.61M

data.title: Copel Reports Strong Q3 2025 Financial Performance
data.description:
TipRanks Cyber Monday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Companhia Paranaense de Energia Pfd ( (ELP) ) has provided an announcement.

In the third quarter of 2025, Copel reported a 7.8% increase in recurring EBITDA, amounting to R$ 1,337.4 million, compared to the same period in 2024. This growth reflects the company’s robust asset management and effective operational strategy, with significant contributions from its generation and transmission segments. The company’s net operating revenue also rose by 18.7% to R$ 6,810.5 million, driven by increased electricity supply revenue and sectorial financial assets. These results underscore Copel’s strong market positioning and operational efficiency, benefiting stakeholders through enhanced financial performance.

The most recent analyst rating on (ELP) stock is a Buy with a $12.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Companhia Paranaense de Energia Pfd stock, see the ELP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ELP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ELP is a Outperform.

Companhia Paranaense de Energia Pfd exhibits strong financial and operational performance, supported by robust technical indicators. However, concerns about increasing leverage, negative free cash flow, and challenges in generation curtailment slightly temper the overall outlook. The attractive dividend yield provides a cushion, but the valuation is not particularly compelling.

To see Spark’s full report on ELP stock, click here.

More about Companhia Paranaense de Energia Pfd

Companhia Paranaense de Energia, also known as Copel, is an energy company based in Paraná, Brazil. It operates in the generation, transmission, distribution, and commercialization of electricity, focusing on providing energy solutions across various segments.

Anonymous Intelligence Company ( (TSE:ANON) ) has shared an announcement.

Anonymous Intelligence Company Inc. has signed a non-binding Letter of Intent with ARKHIVE Technologies Ltd. to acquire a 30% strategic interest in the company. This acquisition aims to leverage both companies’ strengths in Web3 and decentralized technologies, with plans to integrate ANON’s platforms with ARKHIVE’s ecosystem and develop new digital asset products. The collaboration is expected to enhance AI infrastructure and support ARKHIVE’s platform development, while also providing ANON with a significant position in ARKHIVE’s expanding platform.

Anonymous Intelligence Company Inc. is a developer of decentralized network infrastructure, data storage solutions, and AI tools. The company focuses on integrating Web3 technologies and AI-enhanced decentralized systems to create innovative digital asset products and solutions.
